Clay is seeking ambitious undergrads to join the first-ever class of Clay Campus Ambassadors for the 2026–2027 school year. Co-create the campus program directly with our team for Fall 2026 launch.

Who it's for

  • Students interested in GTM Engineering, Growth, Sales or Product
  • Strong communicators who enjoy teaching others
  • Curious about new tools and technologies
  • Sophomore and above
  • Preferred: Prior experience in Growth, Sales, RevOps, or Product

Requirements

  • Enrolled full-time at a 4-year college or university
  • Eager to learn (or already using) Clay
  • Complete 1-week async training the week of June 1 and attend summer planning sessions
  • Strong written and verbal communication skills
  • Excited to collaborate with Clay and other student leaders globally

About Clay

Growth is a creative,
iterative practice. Not a formula.

Clay helps organizations turn any growth idea into reality. As AI makes execution faster and tactics easier to copy, creativity becomes the only durable advantage.

Clay gives teams unique data, signals, and AI-powered workflows to find and reach their best-fit customers. Backed by Sequoia, CapitalG, and First Round — valued at $5B.
